text:

To get an upstream reaction I'll have to reproduce it using vanilla
Q3A. The Urban Terror folks have decided that Open Source is the
enemy.

A: Because it fouls the order in which people normally read text.
Q: Why is top-posting such a bad thing?
A: Top-posting.
